author: Maxim Novak
name: Google Maps Web API
description: A minimal ASP.NET Core Web API wired to GoogleMapsApi with /geocode and /directions endpoints.

apikey.description: Google Maps API key written into appsettings.Development.json (kept out of source control).

Framework.description: The target framework for the generated project. 'replaces' targets the real default TFM literal in GoogleMapsWebApi.csproj so the source project stays valid/restorable for repo-wide tooling.

GoogleMapsApiVersion.description: Pins the generated project to the GoogleMapsApi version it was scaffolded from. 'replaces' targets a real published version literal in GoogleMapsWebApi.csproj (kept restorable for repo-wide tooling); PACKAGE_VERSION_TOKEN is stamped to the actual package version at pack time.
